purpose: Shared technical memory protocol for Claude, Codex, ChatGPT, and Bastian. This memory records validated research, unresolved hypotheses, and investigation backlog without granting implementation authority.
rules: Claude does not modify AI_SHARED_MEMORY or AI_BACKLOG.
Claude may append PROPOSED findings to AI_FINDINGS_LEDGER only when explicitly authorized.
Codex validates findings independently and may update shared memory and backlog when explicitly authorized.
No finding authorizes implementation by itself.
Every ledger entry must include evidence and commit baseline.
Do not repeat VALIDATED findings without new evidence.
APPROVED is not equivalent to IMPLEMENTED.
IMPLEMENTED requires a committed code change tied to a task that explicitly authorized implementation.
Secrets, credentials, DSNs, DB query results, and admin access details must not be stored in these memory files.
Future Claude, Codex, and ChatGPT tasks must read AI_PROJECT_HORIZON, AI_CAPABILITY_MAP, AI_SHARED_MEMORY, and AI_BACKLOG before future research or implementation in this lane.

authority_boundaries.runtime_code: No runtime file may be modified from research memory alone.
authority_boundaries.database: No DB access is authorized by this protocol.
authority_boundaries.commits: Commits require an explicit phase authorization and exact file scope.
authority_boundaries.backlog: Backlog entries describe research or implementation candidates only; they do not approve work.

future_task_required_context.note: Required reading does not change permission limits and does not authorize implementation, DB access, commit, or push.

blind_prompt_routing.purpose: Separate execution-resource selection from the task instructions so model and reasoning choices do not predispose the evaluated agent.
prompt_must_not_include_by_default: claims that one provider or model should outperform another
rules: ChatGPT must provide model/reasoning guidance outside the agent prompt.
Bastian chooses the actual model and reasoning level.
The blind task prompt must not reveal that choice by default.
Model identity may be recorded after completion as observational metadata.
A single task cannot establish model superiority.
quality_target may remain inside the task because it defines the required output contract, not the execution resource.
Model routing guidance does not authorize implementation, DB, commit, or push.
